title: Colorful Redstone Lamps
description: This mod adds Colorful Redstone Lamps to decorate your World
body:
# 🌈 Colorful Redstone Lamps

Tired of the same old orange Redstone Lamp?

**Colorful Redstone Lamps** adds vibrant Redstone Lamps in **every vanilla dye color** — plus fully functional **Inverted variants** for advanced Redstone setups.

More color.  
More control.  
More creative freedom.

***

## ✨ Features

✔ Redstone Lamps in all vanilla dye colors  
✔ Fully functional **Inverted Redstone Lamps**  
✔ Survival-friendly crafting  
✔ 100% Redstone compatible  
✔ Seamless vanilla integration

No new mechanics.  
No unnecessary complexity.  
Just clean, colorful Redstone lighting.

***

## 🔄 Inverted Lamps

The inverted variants behave like classic inverted Redstone Lamps:

*   💡 On when unpowered
*   🔌 Off when powered
*   Perfect for compact Redstone builds
*   Ideal for technical and decorative setups

Build smarter circuits without sacrificing aesthetics.

***

## 🛠 Crafting

## ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1340072/description_c9e9ea76-f7be-463c-88a8-1d496538e3e4.gif)

## 🎨 Perfect For

*   Modern cities
*   Cozy interiors
*   Industrial builds
*   Fantasy structures
*   Advanced Redstone contraptions

Your builds deserve better lighting.

***

## 📦 Compatibility

**Minecraft:** 1.21.1 – 1.21.11  
**Loader:** NeoForge, Fabric

***

## 📦 Modpacks

✔ Allowed

***
